# Email Automation Skill

Email Automation Skill is a skill package for behavioral triggers, lifecycle journeys, and automation governance.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add emailautomationskill
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://emailautomationskill.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://emailautomationskill.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://emailautomationskill.com/skills/emailautomationskill/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://emailautomationskill.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready Email Automation Strategy: https://emailautomationskill.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical Email Automation Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://emailautomationskill.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- Email Automation Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://emailautomationskill.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
